title: Our Final Predictions For Oscars 2026's Best Director Lineup: Who Will Win?
text: ScreenRant's predictions rank the five Best Director nominees ahead of the March 15, 2026 Academy Awards ceremony. The Five Nominees: Chloé Zhao ("Hamnet"), Joachim Trier ("Sentimental Value"), Josh Safdie ("Marty Supreme"), Paul Thomas Anderson ("One Battle After Another"), Ryan Coogler ("Sinners"). Predicted Rankings: 1. Paul Thomas Anderson (PREDICTED WINNER) - Anderson dominated precursor awards, winning at the Golden Globes, Critics' Choice Awards, DGA, and BAFTA. The article notes: "it'd be a nearly unprecedented loss for him at the Oscars" given his strong season performance and previous nominations. 2. Ryan Coogler - Listed as the strongest alternative. His film received record Oscar nominations, though he lost all major precursor awards. 3. Chloé Zhao - The only previous Best Director winner in the lineup, though she lost at all major precursor ceremonies. 4. Joachim Trier - Norwegian filmmaker's lack of DGA nomination significantly hurts his chances. 5. Josh Safdie - His prospects weakened by negative press and losing all three major awards.
